subject: grx020_descriptor_cache_hardening
rationale: The descriptor-heap ring fence hardening is an internal reliability upgrade of the D3D12 recording shim (segmented fence-value reclaim replacing a blind cursor reset). It is not a Godot render pass, so there is nothing to default-enable; it ships always-on inside the d3d12-recording-shim feature and is a no-op for the shipping feature-off bridge.

red_leg.note: Pure-Rust executable spec mirroring the C++ reserve_descriptors / wait_for_descriptor_range algorithm; proves high-pressure wrap-around never reuses a live descriptor range without a fence wait.

does_not_imply: no FPS / p95 / GPU-timestamp / performance claim
